category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/crytic/medusa describes medusa as a go-ethereum-based smart contract fuzzer with coverage-guided fuzzing.
source_facts.description says "Solidity smart contract fuzzer powered by go-ethereum".
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use the name medusa: https://github.com/crytic/medusa.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to secure-contracts.com/program-analysis/medusa/docs/src/ as the documentation.
Official repository contains docs/src/SUMMARY.md with the documentation table of contents.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/crytic/medusa; per instruction repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists fuzzing, assertion/property testing, coverage collection, and CLI support.
source_facts.description and executables identify a Solidity smart contract fuzzer CLI.
